response.overview: After a romantic interest vanishes without explanation, a woman becomes convinced he is dead. With only her phone as a companion, her katabasis through online spaces leads her to psychic mediums, obscure forum communities, social media archives, and conversations with LLMs. As her search deepens, her rabbit-hole investigation leads her through the histories of moving images, digital collective memory, and the new spiritual languages emerging in a technological age.
response.tagline: When love disappears, can it be resurrected?
response.title: Eramus
